privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for cameo_data_manager_env set_tier2_certification_info task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are missing from the environment, which breaks the verifier completely because it attempts to read the non-existent task_result.json output file. The target data entry requirements for certifier name ('Maria T. Rodriguez'), title, date, email, and phone explicitly match the prompt description.
